headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights JPMorgan, Bank of America, Citigroup, Wells Fargo and KeyCorp
summary: JPMorgan and peers slide as the Fed holds rates steady, flags higher inflation, and signals a tougher near-term outlook for bank earnings.
